name: Cross Back Chairs
description: Classic wood dining chairs with a crossed-back design and a cushioned seat — a versatile pairing for farm tables or any outdoor dining setup.

name: Farm Table
description: A rustic wooden farm table that anchors any outdoor dining setup, comfortably seating up to 8 guests.

name: Picnic Tables w/ Pillows and Rug
description: Includes low-profile picnic tables, a floor rug, and pillow seating.
Each table comfortably seats up to 8 adults or 10 small children.
Please note: table decor and place settings are not included with this package.

name: Wood Folding Chairs
description: Sturdy wood folding chairs with a padded seat cushion — an easy, comfortable seating option for any event.
